name: MacWhisper
description: Mac desktop transcription app built on Whisper

developer.comment: Independent indie developer Jordi Bruin / Good Snooze, Amsterdam; no external funding.

first-release.comment: Mac app launched January 17, 2023 on Product Hunt. An iOS companion app launched April 2025.

status.comment: Actively developed; recent versions (v13.x) shipping in 2026.

license.comment: Closed-source proprietary app with a permanent free tier and paid Pro; wraps the open-source Whisper engine but the app itself is not open source.

primary-type.comment: Primarily a file/meeting transcription tool; also offers system-wide Whisper dictation (Gumroad version).

website.comment: Official Gumroad product page; also distributed via the Mac App Store.

real-time-dictation.comment: System-wide dictation lets you transcribe into any text field via a keyboard shortcut. Available only in the macwhisper.com/Gumroad version, not the App Store build.

file-transcription.comment: Core use case: drag-and-drop audio/video files (mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, mov, ogg, opus) for local transcription. Batch folder transcription is Pro.

live-meeting-capture.comment: Pro can record/transcribe meetings via system-audio capture in Zoom, Teams, Webex, Skype, Chime, Discord. No bot that joins calls; relies on local system-audio recording.

streaming-low-latency.comment: Primarily batch-processes finished recordings/files; no live running-transcript streaming mode documented.

audio-sources.comment: Microphone/input recording, file upload, system-audio recording for meetings, and YouTube URL import (Pro). No meeting-bot that joins calls.

underlying-engine.comment: Local Whisper models (Tiny/Base/Medium/Large incl. Large-v3) run on-device; built on the whisper.cpp runtime.

language-count.comment: Approx; inherits Whisper's ~100 transcription languages with auto-detection.

english-accuracy.comment: Accuracy matches the underlying Whisper Large models — strong on clear English in reviews. No tool-specific independent WER published; rating reflects Whisper-class performance.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Inherits Whisper automatic language detection (100+ languages).

custom-vocabulary.comment: Voibe notes the app lacks custom vocabulary injection; no user-facing custom dictionary for boosting terms.

speaker-diarization.comment: Pro feature (beta) that auto-labels Speaker 1/2/...; accuracy varies.

timestamps.comment: Segment-level timestamps; SRT/VTT subtitle export implies timestamped segments.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: AI cleanup/summarization via bring-your-own-key (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Groq) or the optional paid Assistant subscription.

built-in-editor.comment: In-app transcript editing and full-text/speaker search across transcripts. Plain-text correction editor, not media-by-text editing like Descript.

translation.comment: Translate full transcripts via a free DeepL API key, translate audio into another language via Whisper, or translate dictated text via ChatGPT/BYOK; cloud translation also in paid Assistant.

export-formats.comment: TXT plus SRT/VTT subtitle export (Pro) are well attested. Additional formats (CSV/HTML/JSON/DOCX/PDF) are sometimes mentioned but not clearly confirmed in primary sources.

processing-location.comment: Transcription runs fully on-device by default; optional cloud features (Assistant transcription/summaries, DeepL/ChatGPT translation) make it hybrid in practice.

offline-capable.comment: Core local Whisper transcription works fully offline; audio never leaves the device. Only the optional cloud AI/translation features need network.

data-used-for-training.comment: Local on-device processing — audio stays on the user's Mac, so it is not collected for training. Cloud/BYOK features fall under the respective third-party provider terms.

data-deletion-control.comment: Transcripts and recordings are stored locally as files the user fully controls and can delete.

platforms.comment: Primarily macOS desktop; an iOS/iPadOS companion app launched in 2025. No Windows/Linux/web.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Global keyboard shortcut dictates Whisper text into any focused app, replacing Apple Dictation. Gumroad version only.

integrations.comment: Auto-records meetings in Zoom, Teams, Webex, Skype, Chime, and Discord via system-audio capture; only Zoom and Teams have defined tags. No CRM/Slack/Notion/Calendar integration.

api-automation.comment: GUI app with no documented public API/CLI for automation. It can consume third-party AI APIs (BYOK) but exposes no automation interface of its own.

pricing-model.comment: Free tier; Pro as a one-time purchase (~€59 Gumroad) or App Store lifetime IAP; optional Assistant subscription for cloud AI.

free-tier.comment: Permanent free tier with local on-device transcription using the smaller Whisper models (Tiny/Base).

free-allowance.value: Unlimited local transcription with smaller Whisper models (Tiny/Base)
free-allowance.comment: Checked 2026-06-12. Free tier limited to smaller models; larger/most-accurate models and Pro features require a purchase.

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Pro is primarily a one-time purchase (~€59 / ~$69 Gumroad; $99.99 App Store lifetime IAP). An optional Assistant subscription exists ($9.99/mo) but is not the entry path for core transcription, so no representative monthly price.
